items.text: 好了，欢迎来到第三章。 Alright, welcome to chapter 3. 在本节中，我们将使用虚幻的游戏引擎并制作我们的第一个游戏。 And in this section, we're going to embrace the game engine side of Unreal and build our first game. 我们将保持非常简单，在第三人称示例项目的基础上进行构建。 We're going to keep it really simple and we're going to build on top of our third-person example project. 因此，如果你之前没有在内容浏览器中添加这些内容，那么现在就可以在内容浏览器中添加这些内容了、 So if you weren't following along earlier to add this in the content browser, 只需按下添加按钮，即可添加功能或内容包、 you just press the add button, add a feature or content pack, 然后把这个第三人称项目添加到你的文件夹中。 and then just add this third-person project into your folder. 而我们为什么要制作自己的游戏，是因为为了有效地学习虚幻技术、 And why we're going to build our own game is because in order to learn Unreal effectively, 我们首先必须知道我们应该如何使用虚幻来创建游戏 we have to know how we're supposed to use Unreal to create games in the first place 并回答当我们按下播放按钮时会发生什么的问题。 and answer the question of what happens when we press the play button. 因此，当我们进入这个关卡时，就有了这个新控制器。 So when we're in this level, we have this new controller. 这里有我们的曼尼控制器，我们可以在这里四处走动，使用我们的鼠标 We have our Manny controller here where we can walk around and we can use our mouse 我们可以利用空间跳跃。 to move around the world and we can use space to jump. 我们可以跑进这些小方块，它们会有自己的物理模拟 And these little cubes we can run into and they'll have their own physics simulations 和碰撞，这样我们就可以跳到它们上面，并跳到场景中的其他物体上。 and collisions so we can jump on top of them and jump onto other objects in our scene. 如果我按下逃生键，我们就会跳出游戏模式，回到角色所在的位置。 And if I press escape, we'll jump out of game mode exactly where our character was. 但如果我在大纲器中搜索我们的人体模型，它就不会出现。 But if I search for our mannequin in the outliner, it doesn't show up. 那么我们如何告诉虚幻在我们按下播放键时要做什么，以便我们可以控制角色呢？ So how do we tell Unreal what to do when we press play so that we can control characters 还是决定不控制字符？ or decide not to control characters? 那么，如果你点击这里的这个小蓝图图、 Well, if you click on this little blueprint graph up here, 你会看到我们有一种叫做游戏模式的东西。 you'll see that we have something called a game mode. 如果我只是编辑这个游戏模式，看看里面发生了什么、 And if I just edit this game mode to see what's going on inside of it, 你会看到它给出了一个数据列表。 you'll see that it gives us a list of data. 现在，这是一个只包含数据的蓝图，所以这个蓝图上没有视口。 Now, this is a data only blueprint, so there's no viewport attached to this blueprint. 这只是在我们的游戏中设置一些默认值。 And this is just setting some defaults inside of our game. 而最重要的是，是什么让这个角色出现在我们的场景中？ And the one that matters here, what brought that character into our scene 是默认的棋子类别。 is the default pawn class. 而这是以 BP 第三人称角色设置的。 And that's set to BP third person character. 现在，什么是棋子？ Now, what is a pawn? 棋子是任何可以控制的角色。 A pawn is any character that can be controlled. 因此，作为游戏的玩家，你可以控制一个棋子。 So as the player of the game, you can control a pawn. 车辆就是一枚棋子。 A vehicle would be a pawn. 任何可以控制的角色都是棋子。 Any character that can be controlled is a pawn. 所以，你的敌人就是棋子。 So your enemies would be pawns. 所以要使用人工智能，让游戏逻辑来控制棋子。 So use AI so that game logic is controlling pawns. 而棋子只是一张蓝图。 And a pawn is just a blueprint. 因此，如果我创建了一个新的蓝图类，你会发现第二种最常见的蓝图类型是 So if I created a new blueprint class, you'll see that the second most common type of blueprint 是我们可以拥有并接收控制器输入的棋子。 is a pawn that we can possess and receive input from a controller. 就像我说的，因为这个角色被设置为我们的默认棋子等级、 And like I said, because this character is set as our default pawn class, 当我们按下播放键时，该棋子就会被创建。 when we press play, that pawn is going to be created. 现在，只要我们的场景中存在播放器的起始演员，这个演员就会被放置在那里。 And now this actor is going to be placed wherever our player start actor exists inside of our scene. 所以，如果我进入快速添加演员菜单，然后输入播放器启动、 So if I went to this quick add actors menu, and I just typed in player start, 这只是一种可以拖进来的演员类型。 it's just a type of actor that you can drag in. 你只想拥有一个。 You want to have just one. 如果你查看该播放器启动的详细信息面板，你会发现 And if you look in the details panel of this player start, 你会发现我们不能在这里选择演员。 you'll see that we can't select an actor here. 它会自动设置好我们要抓的棋子的游戏模式。 It's automatically set up where we'll grab the pawn of our game mode. 但有一点你要知道，这可以被覆盖。 One thing you should know though, is that this can be overwritten. 如果我转到窗口，输入世界设置，这是可以覆盖的另一个地方。 If I go to window and I type in world settings, this is the one other place where you can override 您所在地图的游戏模式设置。 the game mode settings of whatever map you're inside of. 这将有点隐蔽，尤其是在您开启其他项目时、 This will be kind of hidden, especially if you're opening up other projects, 使用此菜单从市场上下载其他游戏。 other games from the marketplace using this menu. 现在，根据我们在这里选择的游戏模式、 Now, based on whatever game mode we select here, 将为您自动填充这些默认类。 that will auto populate these default classes for you. 但你可以看到，这与我们之前的情况相符。 But you can see this matches what we had before. 默认棋子类别设置为 BP 第三人称角色。 The default pawn class is set to BP third person character. 这就是为什么当我们按下播放键时，我们的角色就会出现，我们可以跳来跳去。 And that's why when we press play, our character spawns and we can jump around 并扮演我们的角色。 and play as our character. 举个例子，如果我跳回到我们的起始层、 So now as an example, if I jump back to our starting level, 按下播放键会发生什么？ what happens when I press play here? 在这种情况下，我必须在屏幕上点击一下，然后就可以在周围进行导航了、 In this case, I have to click on the screen and I can now pilot around, 但默认情况下，我无法控制任何棋子。 but there's no pawn that I'm controlling by default. 它只是创建了一个摄像头。 It just creates a camera. 我们可以从项目设置中找到原因、 And we can see why is because if I look here in our project settings, 没有选择游戏模式。 there's no game mode selected. 因此，在这种情况下，如果我在这个世界中加入第三人称游戏模式、 So in this case, if I added the third person game mode into this world, 现在，如果我在场景中添加一个开始播放的演员，并按下播放键，我们就可以开始播放了、 and now if I add a player start actor into our scene and press play, 我们将采用第三人称游戏模式。 we'll be playing our third person game mode. 现在，如果我取消选择这种游戏模式，还有最后一种方法、 Now, one last way to do this, if I unselect this game mode, 我将游戏模式基类设置为 "无"，并移除玩家启动。 I'll set the game mode base class to none and I'll remove our player start. 所以，如果我把这个第三人称角色拖进我们的场景、 So if I drag in this third person character into our scene, 有一件事我们可以做，如果我在这里选择我的播放器，然后搜索自动拥有播放器。 one thing we can do if I select my player here and we search for auto possess player. 现在它被禁用了。 Right now it's disabled. 因此，当我按下播放键时，我们的场景中就会出现一个摄像头。 So when I press play, I just have a camera inside of our scene. 但如果我把自动拥有播放器改为播放器 0，然后按播放键，就会出现这种情况、 But if I change auto possess player to player zero and then press play, 你会看到，现在我们正在控制这个角色。 you'll see that now we are controlling this character. 很显然，这也解释了为什么 "零号选手 "是这个世界上的 "我们"。 And obviously it makes sense as to why player zero is us in the world. 所以，如果你有一个角色，当你按下播放键时、 So if you ever have a character that when you press play, 你会立刻被他们的控制所吸引。 you're immediately snapping to their controls. 这是因为自动附魔播放器打开了。 It's because that auto possess player is on. 现在你可以将其关闭，但有时这会有所帮助。 Now you can turn this off, but sometimes this is helpful. 如果你只是想把这个第三人称角色拖入你的场景中 If you just want to drag this third person character into your scene 并在不干扰游戏设置的情况下到处跑、 and run around without messing with the game settings, 您只需将小兵拖放到场景中，然后将自动拥有播放器设置为零即可。 you can just drag and drop the pawn into your scene and set auto possess player to zero.
items.speaker: instructor
